title: Bee Removal in Murray Hill, Manhattan | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in Murray Hill, Manhattan. Safe, humane bee extraction from $350-$550. Licensed experts serving Murray Hill residential & commercial properties. Call now!
intro: Murray Hill's mix of historic brownstones, high-rise apartments, and bustling commercial spaces creates numerous opportunities for bee colonies to establish themselves in unexpected places. When bees nest in your Murray Hill property—whether in a Park Avenue co-op, a townhouse near the Morgan Library, or a business along Third Avenue—you need swift, professional removal to ensure safety. Best Pest Control NYC provides expert bee removal services throughout Murray Hill, protecting residents and preserving these important pollinators whenever possible.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Murray Hill's diverse residential and commercial properties for years, understanding the unique challenges of bee infestations in both pre-war buildings and modern high-rises. Our licensed technicians use safe, effective methods to remove bee colonies while prioritizing humane relocation when feasible, and we offer same-day emergency service to address urgent situations in this densely populated Manhattan neighborhood.
localContext: Murray Hill's tree-lined streets, rooftop gardens, and proximity to green spaces like the East River Esplanade make it an attractive area for bees seeking nesting sites. The neighborhood's mix of architectural styles—from converted carriage houses to modern luxury towers—means bee colonies can establish themselves in building facades, air conditioning units, window boxes, and ventilation systems throughout the area between 34th and 42nd Streets.

faqs.question: How much does bee removal cost in Murray Hill?
faqs.answer: Bee removal services in Murray Hill typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the colony size, location accessibility, and complexity of the removal. Ground-level nests in accessible areas are at the lower end, while bees in high-rise building walls, rooftops, or behind facade elements may cost more due to specialized equipment and additional labor required.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove bees from my Murray Hill property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and emergency bee removal services throughout Murray Hill. For urgent situations—such as bees near building entrances, in high-traffic areas, or posing immediate safety concerns—we can typically arrive within 2-4 hours. Scheduled removals can be arranged at your convenience, often within 24 hours of your call.

faqs.question: Do you relocate bees or exterminate them in Murray Hill?
faqs.answer: Whenever possible, we prioritize humane bee relocation, working with local beekeepers to safely transfer healthy colonies. However, in cases where the colony poses immediate danger, is located in a structurally sensitive area of your building, or relocation isn't feasible, we use targeted extermination methods that minimize environmental impact while ensuring complete removal.

faqs.question: What types of properties in Murray Hill do you service for bee removal?
faqs.answer: We provide bee removal services for all property types in Murray Hill, including co-ops and condos, brownstones and townhouses, commercial buildings and storefronts, restaurants and hospitality businesses, and office buildings. Our technicians are experienced with the unique access requirements and protocols of Murray Hill's diverse building stock, from historic properties to modern high-rises.
